sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86674" key="proapopni/gomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προαπο-πνίγομαι</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[ῑ]</foreign>, <sense id="n86674.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be choked, drowned first,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:144" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">144</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
